entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume crop being studied for disease resistance.

entities.name: DISEASE-RESISTANCE BREEDING
entities.description: The process of developing crop varieties resistant to diseases.

entities.name: GENETIC VARIABILITY
entities.description: The diversity in genetic characteristics within a population used for breeding.

entities.name: BREEDING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Specific methods used to improve crop traits and resistance.

entities.name: FUSARIUM OXYSPORUM
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing root and stem rot in chickpea.

entities.name: VERTICILLIUM ALBO-ATRUM
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing wilt and root rot in chickpea.

entities.name: MACROPHOMINA PHASEOLINA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing root rot in chickpea.

entities.name: STEM AND ROOT ROTS
entities.description: Diseases affecting the stem and root systems of the plant.

entities.name: ASCOCHYTA RABIEI
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing foliar blight in chickpea.

entities.name: BOTRYTIS CINEREA
entities.description: A fungal pathogen causing grey mold in chickpea.

entities.name: FOLIAR FUNGAL DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases caused by fungi affecting the leaves and foliage.

entities.name: VIRAL DISEASES
entities.description: Diseases caused by viruses affecting the plant.

entities.name: NEMATODES
entities.description: Microscopic worm-like organisms that can be parasitic to plant roots.

entities.name: MELOIDOGYNE SPECIES
entities.description: Root-knot nematodes that affect chickpea.

entities.name: HETERODERA CICERI
entities.description: Cyst nematode specific to chickpea.

entities.name: PRATYLENCHUS SPECIES
entities.description: Lesion nematodes that affect chickpea.

entities.name: MULTIPLE DISEASE RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of a plant to resist more than one disease simultaneously.

entities.name: ANNUAL WILD CICER SPECIES
entities.description: Wild relatives of chickpea used as potential sources of resistance genes.

entities.name: GENES FOR RESISTANCE
entities.description: Genetic sequences that confer resistance to diseases.

entities.name: RESISTANT CULTIVARS
entities.description: Crop varieties that exhibit resistance to specific diseases.

entities.name: DISEASE MANAGEMENT
entities.description: Strategies to control and reduce the impact of plant diseases.
